$comment: Target catalog for deploy.ps1. NO secrets in this file. Real environments (TEST/PROD) use Windows authentication (auth omitted = integrated). The E2E environment targets the disposable Docker container (db-migrations/tests/docker) with SQL auth; the password is NOT here — it is read at deploy time from the env var named by 'sqlPasswordEnv'. 'eazybusiness' lists the Ebene-A target DBs per environment (mandant clones are regular Ebene-A targets, D11). 'global' is the single Ebene-B DB (RoboticoOps).

E2E.$comment: Ephemeral local Docker container (SQL Server 2022). auth=sql: sa + password from env var MSSQL_SA_PASSWORD (generated into tests/docker/.env.local). Never a real server.
